commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an opt-in plain-language plugin approval mode across config, shared approval rendering, Telegram/Matrix payloads, docs, SDK exports, and focused tests.

PR surface: Source +3711, Tests +2783, Docs +10, Generated 0. Total +6504 across 41 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection at the PR head shows `Reply with: /approve <id> ...` in the raw/simple-technical fallback path, while current main uses the concrete request id. No runtime test was run because this is a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can fix the concrete fallback-id regression and refresh the branch, while maintainers still need to review the public config/API and approval-security boundary afterward.
